briefing: Tensions in the Middle East continue to escalate as Israel intensifies its strikes on Beirut in its campaign against Hezbollah and has killed Iran's intelligence minister, Esmaeil Khatib, marking a significant escalation in the broader regional conflict. Stateside, a disturbing investigation has surfaced accusing civil rights icon Cesar Chavez of abusing girls for years, potentially reshaping the legacy of the celebrated labor leader. In tech news, Marvel fans are buzzing over the new *Spider-Man: Brand New Day* trailer, while smart home enthusiasts will note that Matter support is coming to one of the market's top robot vacuums. Meanwhile, Chicago's theater scene is thriving, with the Black Ensemble Theater reviving *The Jackie Wilson Story* and Lookingglass exploring themes of ghosts and desire in *White Rooster*.
